items.text: 🚨 NEW 2X SK HYNIX ETF DEBUTS Leverage Shares launched $SKHX on Tuesday, a 2x leveraged ETF tied to SK Hynix. The fund aims to deliver 2x the stock’s daily performance and carries a 0.75% expense ratio. Like all leveraged ETFs, it’s designed for short-term trading and comes with

🚨 SK HYNIX VOLATILITY GOES BOTH WAYS SK Hynix plunged a record 15%, dragging the Kospi down 9% and triggering a market-wide trading halt as concerns grew that South Korea’s AI rally had become overstretched. Position for either direction: $SKHX — 2x Long SK Hynix $SKHZ — 1x
